title: Catalog entity index
description: Per-product version/stability entities extracted from the catalog at index-build time (or by `gpt build-entities` over an existing index). Powers deterministic, cited answers to version-superlative questions (newest / latest-stable) via intent routing in `gpt ask`. Written by scripts/lib/entities.py. Read-only derived data: rebuildable from chunks at any time.

product.description: Product whose versions were tracked (e.g. ados-profile).

versions.description: Map of major.minor version token -> evidence record.

mentions.description: Total product-qualified mentions across the catalog.

unstable_votes.description: Count of product-scoped 'not approved / not stable' signals governing this version.

top_chat.description: chat_id with the most mentions of this version (citation anchor).

evidence.description: A representative instability sentence, when flagged.

acronym.description: Most-supported expansion of the product acronym (e.g. ADOS -> Agentic Digital Operating System), for deterministic 'what does X stand for' answers.
